body.title: Substrate artifact inventory — 2026-06-27 (8 stray files; split far smaller than feared)
body.text:
# Substrate artifact inventory — 2026-06-27
Ticket: T-substrate-artifact-inventory (D-canonical-substrate-consolidation-2026-06-27)
Method: `rg --files` over ~ (reach hidden+ignored), skip build/cache noise + ~/.unseen_university/akien,
keep dev-artifact filename signatures (*.slate.txt, decisions|tickets|slates|sessions|proofs|rules|
design_patterns|notes|projects|architecture dirs, cc.N.{T,D,S,Q,C,G}-*.json). Sweep file + remainder in
session scratchpad.

## Totals (7980 artifact-signature files)
| Category | Count | Disposition |
|---|---|---|
| CANONICAL — devlab/runtime/memory/ | 2478 | already home ✓ |
| TheIgors-family (TheIgorsProject, TheIgors.archive, TheIgors-cert-walks, .TheIgors) | 4380 | governed by **T-theigors-archive-artifact-freeze** — NOT UU artifacts to migrate |
| .claude harness store (subagents, tool-results, memory/) | 1110 | EXEMPT (separate product) |
| Trash/.vscode (incl. pylance "rules" false-pos) | 66 | EXEMPT/noise |
| **REMAINDER — true candidates** | **8** | see below |

## The 8 true candidates (everything outside canonical/TheIgors/.claude/noise)
### A) repo docs/decisions/ — 3 files
- docs/decisions/imap-impl.md, mailbox-naming.md, installer-bootstrap.md
- All carry decision_id **D-adc-phase-0-2026-04-27**, status locked/resolved, dated 2026-04-27.
- CLAUDE.md note: ADC phase decisions pre-date the FS migration, live outside the store, "treat as
  historical spec." So these are acknowledged-historical, not accidental drift.
- PROPOSED: exempt-with-reason (historical ADC spec) OR convert to architecture/ intention-points. Akien's call.

### B) ~/.unseen_university/cc_channel/notes/ — 5 files
- 2026-03-26 {ebooks-root-path, lost-reading-list, phase2-list-origin, reboot-inprogress},
  2026-04-03 igor-queue-loop-broken.
- Stale 2026-03/04 operational scratch in the uu_home() runtime dir (reading-list rebuild; a queue bug).
- PROPOSED: drop/archive (obsolete runtime-era scratch, not load-bearing) OR migrate to notes/ if any
  historical value. Akien's call.

## Conclusion
The source-of-truth split is far smaller than feared: only 8 stray files, both clusters arguably
exempt-by-default (ADC historical-spec per CLAUDE.md; runtime-era scratch under uu_home). The gated
consolidation (T-substrate-artifact-consolidation) is near-trivial once Akien picks treatment for A and B.
This informs D-canonical-substrate-consolidation's hypothesis: the home-wide store is already ~clean.
